sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (ஆண்பால்)
blood, bloodshed, to be shed by violence

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of uncertain derivation; blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specifically (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication bloodshed, also kindred: - blood.
